seoTitle: Aesyl Amano — AI-native film & brand studio
seoDescription: Aesyl Amano is an AI-native creative studio making film, brand work, and content systems. Strange, considered, fast. Based in Bulgaria, working worldwide.

hero.headline: From the depths, something stranger.
hero.lede: Aesyl Amano is an AI-native film and brand studio. We make work that's luminous, uncanny, and considered — surfaced from somewhere deeper than the brief.

about.heading: About
paragraphs: Aesyl Amano is an independent AI Production Studio based in Sofia and London.
We're AI-native — film, brand systems, and content built with generative tools as the camera, the crew, and the lighting rig. That means we move fast without the work ever looking fast or cheap.
Based in Sofia, working worldwide, bilingual in English and Bulgarian. Comfort as a baseline — and then we launch from it into something stranger.

items.title: Lantern
items.desc: A two-minute brand film built end-to-end in AI. Otherworldly, warm, no crew.

items.title: Bathyal
items.desc: A launch — one concept, dived into nine platform cuts.

items.title: Specimen
items.desc: Concept work probing the line between biology and machine.

items.title: Bioluminescence
items.desc: A living identity in motion — light made from movement.

items.marker: Let the world carry your brand

contact.heading: Book a FREE-30min Consulation
contact.lede: Tell us what you're launching. We'll tell you the fastest honest way to make it good.
